gates.name: required_sections
gates.description: Page must contain Hero, Features/content, and CTA sections

gates.name: has_cta
gates.description: Page must contain at least one call-to-action link or button
gates.error_message: No CTA link found — page must have at least one [label](url) link

gates.name: no_dev_slang
gates.description: Page copy must not contain dev slang

gates.name: bot_self_reference
gates.description: Output must never acknowledge being a bot or AI

params.pattern: (?i)(as an ai|i am a bot|i'm automated|i am automated|as a language model|i'm an ai|i am an ai)
